editcheck-dialog-addref-description: Ka caawi akhristayaasha inay fahmaan halka macluumaadkani ka yimid adigoo ku daraya tixraac.
editcheck-dialog-addref-reject-descripti: Tafatirayaal kale waxay ka faa'iideysan lahaayeen inay wax badan ka ogaadaan sababta aad u dooratay inaadan ku darin tixraac.
editcheck-dialog-addref-reject-irrelevan: Uma malaynayo in tixraacyadu khuseeyaan isbeddelka aan samaynayo
editcheck-dialog-addref-reject-common-kn: Macluumaadka aan ku darayo waa mid si ballaaran loo yaqaan
editcheck-dialog-addref-reject-uncertain: Ma hubo tixraaca aan ku darayo
editcheck-dialog-addref-success-notify: Waad ku mahadsan tahay inaad ku dartay xigasho!
editcheck-dialog-title: Ka hor inta aan la daabicin
editcheck-copyvio-description: Fadlan ka fogow inaad nuqul ka sameyso qoraal ka yimid ilo kale, xitaa haddii aad dib u habayn ama aad tixraacdo. Tani waxaa loo tixgelin karaa [{{int:editcheck-copyvio-descriptionlink}} ku-xadgudub xuquuqda daabacaadda ama been-abuur] waxaana laga yaabaa in waxyaabahaaga la tirtiro ama akoonkaaga la xannibo.
editcheck-copyvio-keep-description: Fadlan ka caawi tifaftirayaasha kale ee maqaalka inay fahmaan sababta aad u rabto in qoraalka la dhajiyay la sii hayo.
editcheck-copyvio-keep-wrote: Waxaan anigu qoray qoraalkan mana lagu daabicin meel kale
editcheck-copyvio-keep-permission: Qoraalkan si xor ah ayaa loo shatiyeeyay
editcheck-copyvio-keep-other: Midkoodna kuwa kor ku xusan ma khuseeyo
editcheck-copyvio-keep-notify: Waad ku mahadsan tahay inaad la wadaagtay sababta aad u rabto in qoraalka la dhajiyay la sii hayo!
editcheck-copyvio-remove-notify: Waad ku mahadsan tahay ka qayb qaadashada ilaalinta in aqoontu si xor ah u heli karo!
editcheck-double-bold-title: Ka saar qaabeynta qoraalka culus ee aan loo baahnayn
editcheck-double-bold-description: Qoraalka culus si toos ah ayaa loo mariyaa cinwaannada hoose, erayada liiska qeexidda iyo madaxyada jadwalka. Ka caawi akhristayaasha adigoo ka saaraya [{{int:editcheck-double-bold-descriptionlink}} qaabeynta qoraalka culus ee aan loo baahnayn] qaybahan.
editcheck-preference-suggestions-descrip: Talooyin wax ka beddel oo ay bulshadu dejisay si loo hagaajiyo maqaalada. Waxa laga heli karaa [[:mw:Special:MyLanguage/Help:VisualEditor/User_guide|tafaftiraha muuqaalka]].
editcheck-tone-description: Isticmaalayaasha kale badanaa way dib u eegaan noocan eray-bixinta, iyagoo sheegaya in codka uusan dheellitirnayn. [{{int:editcheck-tone-descriptionlink}} Wax badan baro]
editcheck-tone-footer: Waxaa lagu aqoonsaday iyadoo la adeegsanayo [{{int:editcheck-tone-footerlink}} modelka BERT]
editcheck-tone-description-acted: Ka fiirso hadallo ama erayo ammaan xad dhaaf ah, meel ka dhac ah, aan caddeyn, caadi noqday, ama taageeraya aragti gaar ah.
editcheck-tone-reject-uncertain: Ma hubo sida loo hagaajiyo codka
editcheck-tone-thank: Waad ku mahadsan tahay inaad tixgelisay codka!
editcheck-yearlink-description: Xiriirkan wuxuu tilmaamayaa sanad ka duwan kan ku qoran qoraalka. Ka caawi in maqaalka uu noqdo mid sax ah adigoo cusboonaysiinaya sanadka muuqda iyo sanadka xiriirka si ay isugu waafaqaan.
editcheck-suggestedlink-description: Qoraalkan ma ku xirmayo maqaal kale. Ku dar xiriir si [{{int:editcheck-suggestedlink-descriptionlink}} aad uga caawiso akhristayaasha inay wax badan bartaan] mawduucan.
editcheck-suggestedlink-footer: Xiriirrada la soo jeediyay waa kuwo mashiin sameeyay. Dib u eeg ka hor inta aadan ku darin.
editcheck-external-link-description: Xiriirkan wuxuu tilmaamayaa [{{int:editcheck-external-link-descriptionlink}} mareeg dibadeed]. Ka caawi akhristayaasha inay diiradda saaraan nuxurka adigoo ka saaraya xiriirkan, u raraya qaybta “Xiriirrada dibadda”, ama u beddelaya [{{int:editcheck-external-link-convertlink}} tixraac] haddii ay habboon tahay.
editcheck-duplicate-link-description: Xiriirkan wuxuu ka muuqdaa in ka badan hal jeer qaybtan. Ka caawi akhristayaasha inay si fudud u socdaan adigoo ka saaraya [{{int:editcheck-duplicate-link-descriptionlink}} xiriirrada soo noqnoqda].
editcheck-adjacent-link-description: Xiriiriyeyaashan isku midka ah waa isku xigaan ama waxaa u dhexeeya keliya meel bannaan. Ka caawi akhristayaasha inay si fudud u dhex maraan adigoo ku mideynaya hal xiriiriye.
editcheck-disambiguation-title: Ku xidh bog ka sii gaar ah
editcheck-disambiguation-description: Xiriirkan wuxuu tilmaamayaa [{{int:editcheck-disambiguation-descriptionlink}} bog kala soocid]. Ka caawi akhristayaasha inay helaan mawduuca saxda ah adigoo ku xiraya bog ka sii gaar ah.
editcheck-headinglevel-description: Heerkan cinwaan waxaa laga yaabaa inuusan raacin qaab-dhismeedka is xiga ee saxda ah. Ka caawi akhristayaasha inay si fudud u fahmaan nuxurka adigoo isticmaalaya [{{int:editcheck-headinglevel-descriptionlink}} heerka cinwaanka] saxda ah.
editcheck-image-caption-description: Sawirkan ma laha sharraxaad. Ka caawi akhristayaasha inay fahmaan sababta sawirku u khuseeyo adigoo ku daraya [{{int:editcheck-image-caption-descriptionlink}} sharraxaad kooban].
editcheck-convertreference-description: Tixraacan waxaa ka maqan faahfaahin. Ka caawi akhristayaasha inay fahmaan halka xogtu ka timid adigoo u beddelaya [{{int:editcheck-convertreference-descriptionlink}} tixraac] si habboon loo qaabeeyey. Ka dib markaad u beddesho, hubi saxnaanta faahfaahinta uu qalabku ku daray, kana saar wax kasta oo khaldan ama wareer leh.
editcheck-reject-description: Tifaftirayaal kale waxay jeclaan lahaayeen inay bartaan sababta aad u samaysay doorashadan.
editcheck-specialeditchecks-info: Hubinta wax ka beddelka waxaa lagu habeeyaa [[MediaWiki:Editcheck-config.json]]. Si aad u hesho dukumeenti, eeg [https://www.mediawiki.org/wiki/Edit_check/Configuration Habaynta Edit check].
editcheck-specialeditchecks-disabled: Hubinta wax ka beddelka laguma shaqaysiinin wiki-kan.
tag-editcheck-reference-decline-common-k: Hubinta tafatirka (tixraacyada) waa la diiday (aqoon guud)
Tixraaca EditCheck waxaa loo diiday inuu yahay aqoon guud
tag-editcheck-reference-decline-irreleva: Hubinta tafatirka (tixraacyada) waa la diiday (aan khusayn)
Tixraaca EditCheck waa la diiday maadaama uusan khusayn.
tag-editcheck-reference-decline-other: Hubinta tafatirka (tixraacyada) waa la diiday (sabab kale)
tag-editcheck-reference-decline-other-de: Tixraaca EditCheck waxaa loo diiday sabab aan ku jirin liiska
tag-editcheck-reference-decline-uncertai: EditCheck (tixraacyo) waa la diiday (aan la hubin)
Tixraaca EditCheck waxaa loo diiday sababo la xiriira hubanti la'aan
